QR Code Generator

Generate a QR code for any URL, text, email, phone number or Wi-Fi password. Download instantly as PNG.

#000000
#ffffff

Your QR code will appear here

🔒 Your data is never stored. QR codes are generated instantly.

How to create a QR code

Type or paste any URL, text, email address or phone number into the input field. Your QR code generates instantly as you type. Customize the size and foreground color, then download the QR code as a PNG image file — ready to use in print, digital or social media.

What can I encode in a QR code?

QR codes can encode any text string: website URLs, plain text messages, email addresses (prefix with "mailto:"), phone numbers (prefix with "tel:"), SMS messages, vCard contact information and Wi-Fi credentials. The most common use is encoding a URL so that scanning the QR code opens a website directly in the camera app.

Where are QR codes used?

Business cards linking to a LinkedIn profile or portfolio. Restaurant menus accessed by scanning a table code. Event tickets and boarding passes. Product packaging linking to instructions or promotional content. Marketing materials and posters linking to landing pages. Store windows allowing contactless access to an online shop. Museum exhibits linking to audio guides or extended information.

How large should a QR code be for print?

A good rule of thumb is that the QR code should be at least 2 cm × 2 cm (about 0.8 inches square) for reliable scanning at typical reading distances. For billboards or large-format printing, scale up proportionally. The scanning distance should not exceed 10× the size of the QR code — a 3 cm code is readable from up to 30 cm away.

Is the QR code free with no watermark?

Yes. Completely free, no watermark, no account, no usage limits. Generate as many QR codes as you need.
